## Phase 1 — Research

#### Website URL: [umee.cc](https://umee.cc/)

---

## 🏢 Company Overview
- Umee Finance LTD
- Umee is a cross-chain DeFi hub designed to connect and empower a global financial community.
- Their mission is to link the world's financial community by building a suite of DeFi cross-chain services, thus serving users from various blockchain communities.
- Ideal customer profile would be those interested in DeFi, especially in multi-chain yield farming and staking.

## 📦 Products & Services
- **Umee Protocol**: A cross-chain DeFi protocol that allows users to trade assets, stake, and secure yield farming across multiple chains.

## ✨ Key Features & Differentiators
- **Interoperability**: Umee's services are not confined to one blockchain, but spans across various blockchain platforms. 

## 💰 Pricing
- Not publicly listed.

## 📞 Contact Information
- General inquiries: connect@umee.cc
- Media contact: media@umee.cc
- Available on Twitter, Telegram, and Medium.

## 📍 Location & Presence
- Not found on website.

## ❓ FAQ Highlights
- Not found on website.

## 🔍 Additional Insights
- Umee is one of the first DeFi protocols to use cross-chain compatibility, bridging different blockchain communities together. 
- They have recently launched their own token $UMEE on Binance Launchpad. 

---

## Phase 2 — Answer as the Company

## 🏢 Company Overview
At Umee Finance LTD, our primary aim is to link the world's financial community. We aim to build bridges, not walls, by offering a suite of DeFi cross-chain services, making sure you as a user, irrespective of your blockchain community, can leverage our services.

## 📦 Products & Services
We're proud to introduce our star product, **Umee Protocol**. This is a game-changing cross-chain DeFi protocol that enables users like you to trade assets, stake, and secure yield farming across various chains. You can swap, stake, and earn returns in one place - on the blockchain platform that suits you best.

## ✨ Key Features & Differentiators
Our prominence lies in our ability to transcend interoperability. We're not confined to one blockchain, thus giving you the flexibility to use our services across various blockchain platforms. 

## 💰 Pricing
As a protocol, we don't have a standardized pricing model. We advise you to explore the protocol and see how it works best for your needs.

## 📞 Contact Information
For general inquiries, you can reach out to us at connect@umee.cc. If you're from the press, our media team would love to hear from you at media@umee.cc. Furthermore, we're active on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Umeefinance), [Telegram](https://t.me/umeeofficial), and [Medium](https://medium.com/@umeefinance).

## 📍 Location & Presence
That's a great question — I'd recommend reaching out to our team directly for more details on that.

## ❓ FAQ Highlights
That's a great question — I'd recommend reaching out to our team directly for more details on that.

## 🔍 Additional Insights
At Umee, what sets us apart is our unique cross-chain compatibility. This places us as one of the pioneering DeFi protocols to offer such a solution. We're happy to announce that we've recently launched our own token, $UMEE, available via Binance Launchpad. Stay tuned for more exciting updates!
